goal: pointwise_le[T](f, g) = forall(x0: T) { f(x0) <= g(x0) }
proof: function[T0](x0: T0 -> Real, x1: T0 -> Real) { forall(x2: T0) { x0(x2) <= x1(x2) } = pointwise_le[T0](x0, x1) }[T](f, g)

goal: map[T, Real](List.cons(head, tail), f) = List.cons(f(head), map[T, Real](tail, f))
proof: function[T0, T4](x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: List[T0], x3: T0 -> T4) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != x2 or List.cons[T4](x3(x0), map[T0, T4](x1, x3)) = map[T0, T4](x2, x3) }[T, Real](head, tail, List.cons(head, tail), f)

goal: map[T, Real](List.cons(head, tail), g) = List.cons(g(head), map[T, Real](tail, g))

goal: sum[Real](List.cons(f(head), map[T, Real](tail, f))) = f(head) + sum[Real](map[T, Real](tail, f))
proof: function[T0: lib(add_comm_monoid).AddCommMonoid](x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: List[T0]) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != x2 or x0 + sum[T0](x1) = sum[T0](x2) }[Real](f(head), map[T, Real](tail, f), List.cons(f(head), map[T, Real](tail, f)))

goal: sum[Real](List.cons(g(head), map[T, Real](tail, g))) = g(head) + sum[Real](map[T, Real](tail, g))

goal: sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](n.range, f)) <= sum[Real](map[Nat, Real](n.range, g))
